name: Hot Artichoke Dip
recipeIngredient: 14 ounces Artichoke hearts, drained and chopped
1 can (4 ounces) chopped green chilies, drained (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
3. Spoon the mixture into a 9-inch pie plate or shallow ovenproof dish.
4. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until lightly browned.
5. Sprinkle with sliced green onions and chopped tomatoes, if desired.
6. Serve with tortilla chips, crackers, or assorted cocktail bread slices.
7. Makes 2 cups.
VARIATION: Spinach Artichoke Dip
1. Stir in 10 ounces chopped spinach, thawed and well drained, into the artichoke mixture.
2. Bake as desired.
